url.description: The base URL of your Uptime Kuma instance (e.g., http://192.168.1.100:3001).

slug.description: The slug of the Uptime Kuma status page.

ignoreTlsErrors.description: Allow this plugin to connect to Uptime Kuma even when TLS certificate validation fails. Prefer trusting your internal CA instead.

refreshMinutes.description: Status refresh interval in minutes. Minimum 1.
